message: Preview for mode 'pr_only' is informational only. Generate a PR bundle to review the change set.
impact_summary: All four bucket-level public access block settings will be enabled for this bucket.

blocked_reasons: Bucket website hosting is enabled; use the manual preservation path before enforcing Block Public Access.

rejected_profiles.detail: Bucket website hosting is enabled; use the manual preservation path before enforcing Block Public Access.

resolution.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded strategy 's3_bucket_block_public_access_standard' to manual S3.2 preservation profile 's3_bucket_block_public_access_manual_preservation'. Bucket website hosting is enabled; use the manual preservation path before enforcing Block Public Access.
